name: Duiba Group Limited
summary: Duiba Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a user management software as a service (SaaS) provider for online businesses in the People's Republic of China. The company's SaaS platform offers user management tools, including reward points system operation, membership marketing operation, and gamification operation to enhance mobile app user activity and participation on apps. It also operates an interactive advertising platform. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
